ques: Locate a large store in Washington that has kids' and maternity products, also check if it has a parking lot.
answer: The large store is buybuy BABY at 17686 Southcenter Pkwy, Tukwila, Washington (in the Parkway Super Center) — a large retailer of kids'/baby gear plus maternity products; yes, it has a parking lot (it's located in the Parkway Super Center shopping plaza). Note: this location is currently listed as permanently closed on Google Maps.
